models.doc: Client message for async job websocket sessions.
models.name: AsyncJobWebSocketClientEvent

models.doc: Async job websocket envelope. `job.snapshot` is emitted immediately after upgrade, `job.updated` is emitted when the normalized async payload changes, `job.deleted` is emitted when the owned job record disappears, and `pong` replies to client `ping` messages.
models.name: AsyncJobWebSocketServerEvent

models.doc: Recent gateway-managed async webhook delivery attempt.
models.name: AsyncWebhookDeliveryAttempt

models.doc: Public delivery summary for gateway-managed async webhooks. Use this to distinguish job execution state from webhook delivery health.
models.name: AsyncWebhookDeliverySummary

models.doc: Sanitized async webhook configuration plus delivery state. Secrets are never returned; `has_secret` indicates whether signed deliveries are enabled. Signed deliveries include x-phaseo-signature, x-phaseo-timestamp, x-phaseo-event-id, x-phaseo-event-type, x-phaseo-delivery-key, x-phaseo-attempt, and x-phaseo-max-attempts headers.
models.name: AsyncWebhookPublicState

models.doc: Benchmark identifier.
models.name: BenchmarkId

models.doc: Gateway debug controls. These flags are never forwarded upstream.
models.name: DebugOptions

models.doc: Google multimodal embeddings extension item.
models.name: EmbeddingsMultimodalInput

models.doc: Gateway-managed server tool. The gateway executes the datetime lookup and injects the result back into the model tool loop.
models.name: GatewayDatetimeToolDefinition

models.doc: Gateway-managed server tool. The gateway fetches one HTTP(S) page, reduces it to bounded text, and injects the result back into the model tool loop.
models.name: GatewayWebFetchToolDefinition

models.doc: Gateway-managed server tool. The gateway executes a web search and injects normalized search results back into the model tool loop.
models.name: GatewayWebSearchToolDefinition

models.doc: Known callable model identifier snapshot used for SDK helper constants and autocomplete.
models.name: KnownModelId

models.doc: Model identifier. This is a runtime string so newly released models can be used without waiting for an SDK update.

models.doc: Tool selection strategy. `gateway:datetime`, `gateway:web_search`, and `gateway:web_fetch` are accepted and rewritten by the gateway into upstream function/tool targets.

operations.doc:
Opens a persistent websocket session for owned async batch or video job updates.
WebSocket handshake uses HTTP GET upgrade semantics and returns `101 Switching Protocols` on success (not `200`). The socket emits a `job.snapshot` immediately after upgrade and subsequent `job.updated` envelopes when the normalized async job payload changes.
If `close_on_terminal` is enabled, the gateway closes the socket after a terminal `completed`, `failed`, `cancelled`, or `expired` update.

params.doc: Close the socket after a terminal lifecycle update.
params.name: close_on_terminal

params.doc: Polling interval used by the websocket recovery loop.
params.name: interval_ms

responses.doc: Async job not found or not owned by the caller
